catalyst: ACACIA-HCM Phase 3 topline data (aficamten in nHCM)
bull_impact: Confirms major market expansion into non-obstructive HCM — a larger underserved population than oHCM. Could double addressable market.
bear_risk: Trial failure would remove key growth driver and pressure stock significantly.

bull_impact: Strong EU uptake confirms global commercial potential beyond US.
bear_risk: Slow EU launch signals competitive or pricing headwinds.

bull_impact: Deal close triggers $700M upfront — removes dilution risk and validates platform.
bear_risk: Regulatory delay in close; unlikely but possible.

bull_impact: Full enrollment toward accelerated approval filing. Strong ORR data could accelerate NDA filing.
bear_risk: Slow enrollment or safety signal delays timeline.

bull_impact: Phase 3 start validates regulatory path toward full approval.
bear_risk: Protocol delays push timeline into 2027.

bull_impact: First FDA filing for a drug in uveal melanoma — a cancer with no approved treatments.
bear_risk: FDA refuses to file or requests additional data.

bull_impact: Positive data expands label to a broader mUM population.
bear_risk: Negative data limits label to HLA*A2-negative subset only.

bull_impact: Confirms 32% ORR signal and shows <20% high-grade diarrhea — clears path to registrational trial.
bear_risk: Toxicity rate >20% or ORR fails to hold in larger cohort.

catalyst: FDA alignment on registrational trial design
bull_impact: FDA agrees on single-arm accelerated approval path — reduces time to market.
bear_risk: FDA requires randomized controlled trial — significantly longer timeline.

bull_impact: Broadens story to 350K+ EpCAM-positive patients across multiple tumor types.
bear_risk: Early safety signals in expansion cohorts slow momentum.

bull_impact: Phase 3 start is the key de-risking event — confirms FDA alignment and lower 2.5mg starting dose.
bear_risk: FDA requests protocol changes or enrollment delays signal.

catalyst: Phase 3 protocol and FDA alignment details
bull_impact: Clear DILI monitoring protocol and manageable stopping rules builds confidence.
bear_risk: Aggressive DILI stopping rules signal FDA concern about liver safety.

bull_impact: National coverage determination for Galleri unlocks large-scale recurring revenue.
bear_risk: Coverage denial forces out-of-pocket model — slows volume growth significantly.

bull_impact: Continued 50%+ volume growth confirms commercial traction.
bear_risk: Volume growth decelerates — signals pricing or demand headwinds.

catalyst: Q2 2026 earnings — revenue and guidance update
bull_impact: Revenue beat and raised guidance confirms transplant surveillance demand acceleration.
bear_risk: Miss or guidance cut raises reimbursement risk concerns.

bull_impact: Successful integration adds viral-mediated cancer surveillance to existing platform.
bear_risk: Integration delays or cost overruns pressure margins.

catalyst: TRYNGOLZA and DAWNZERA commercial revenue update
bull_impact: Strong product revenue confirms transition to commercial-stage high-margin biotech.
bear_risk: Slow launch velocity raises questions about commercial execution.

bull_impact: Additional pipeline catalysts diversify and de-risk the story.
bear_risk: Clinical setbacks pressure royalty stream expectations.

bull_impact: Positive interim data validates the platform and triggers milestone payments to NBTX.
bear_risk: Negative interim triggers trial reassessment — J&J may deprioritize.

bull_impact: Milestone payment extends runway and validates capital-light model.
bear_risk: Milestone missed — delays cash inflow and tests runway assumptions.
